Premium

Upgrade your server
with Dracon Premium

Choose the plan that fits your community. All plans include no-prefix access for as long as your premium lasts.

Coming soon

Premium is not available yet

We're still working on it, but you can pre-buy your plan now and we'll activate it for you the moment it launches. Pre-buyers get guaranteed access at today's prices. Join our support server to pre-purchase or ask questions.
